name: gowth-mem
description: Single-plugin marketplace for gowth-mem — global topic-organized memory layer for Claude Code.

plugins.name: gowth-mem
plugins.description: Persistent topic-organized memory for Claude Code. Global ~/.gowth-mem/ synced across machines via your own git remote. v3.9: provenance & verification — TYPE-encoded epistemic status (verified [ref] vs new UNVERIFIED [hypothesis] with a Verify: path that promotes to [ref] when confirmed) + new [goal] type (user intent: Status lifecycle + verifiable Done-when); commits state WHY/WHAT/WHEN deterministically. v3.8: file+content schema validators, hard write-gate, active forgetting. v3.4: tag-aware FTS5, /mem-dream (Light/REM/Deep), /mem-recall. Multi-session safe via fcntl locks, AI-mediated conflict resolution.
